recommendations.title: Phantasm III: Lord of the Dead

recommendations.title: Phantasm IV: Oblivion
recommendations.overview: Taking off immediately where the last one ended, Mike travels across dimensions and time,  fleeing from the Tall Man while trying to find the origins of his enemy and what really happened the night that his brother died. Meanwhile, Reggie battles sph

recommendations.title: Phantasm
recommendations.overview: A teenage boy and his friends face off against a mysterious grave robber, known only as the Tall Man, who employs a lethal arsenal of unearthly weapons.

recommendations.title: John Dies at the End
recommendations.overview: A new drug promises out-of-body experiences, but users are coming back changed forever, and an otherworldly invasion of Earth is underway.

recommendations.title: Phantasm: Ravager
recommendations.overview: Brothers Mike and Jody join family friend Reggie to battle the Tall Man and his evil minions from another dimension, for the final time.

recommendations.title: The Beastmaster

recommendations.title: Bubba Ho-tep
recommendations.overview: The "true" story of what really became of Elvis Presley. We find Elvis as an elderly resident in an East Texas rest home, who switched identities with an Elvis impersonator years before his "death," then missed his chance to switch back. He must team

recommendations.title: Five Nights at Freddy's
recommendations.overview: Recently fired and desperate for work, a troubled young man named Mike agrees to take a position as a night security guard at an abandoned theme restaurant: Freddy Fazbear's Pizzeria. But he soon discovers that nothing at Freddy's is what it seems.

recommendations.title: Road to Perdition

recommendations.title: Advantages of Travelling by Train
recommendations.overview: After interning her insane husband in a remote psychiatric hospital, book editor Helga Pato returns home by train, where she meets a mysterious man who identifies himself as a psychiatrist.
